89485: [pkg: onnx] advisory='Affected versions of the onnx package are vulnerable to Improper Input Validation due to improper trust verification logic in onnx.hub.load(). The silent=True parameter suppresses all security warnings and confirmation prompts, allowing model downloads from untrusted repositories.', reason_to_ignore='GHSA-hqmj-h5c6-369m, onnx.hub.load() is not used in DLC training workflows', spec='<=1.20.1'
89623: [pkg: pyasn1] advisory='Affected versions of the pyasn1 package are vulnerable to Denial of Service (DoS) due to uncontrolled recursion when decoding deeply nested ASN.1 data. The vulnerability exists in the BER decoder indefLenValueDecoder, valueDecoder, and _decodeComponentsSchemaless code paths, where decodeFun is recursively invoked for nested SEQUENCE, SET, SEQUENCE OF, and SET OF elements without enforcing a recursion-depth limit.', reason_to_ignore='DoS via deeply nested ASN.1 structures - not exploitable in DLC training workflows where ASN.1 input is not user-controlled', spec='< 0.6.3'
